title: Enqueue with priority and queue override at runtime
prompt: Write `MyApp.Jobs.enqueue_with_priority/2` that takes a `worker` module and a `priority` integer (0..9). It should call `worker.new(%{}, queue: :priority_lane, priority: priority)` and pipe to `Oban.insert/1`. Include `@type priority :: 0..9` as a typespec on the function. Write to `lib/my_app/jobs.ex`.
tier_rationale: Tests the 0..9 priority range + runtime override via `new/2`. The typespec forces the author to state the valid range.
